name: @contextifly/render
description: RenderContextifly — compiles declarative UI source into a deterministic, measurable execution model (React IR → Runtime IR → Execution Plan → Scene Frames), validated against the framework itself.

scripts.compile: npm run extract && node semantic.cjs && node planner.cjs && node vm.cjs
scripts.all: npm run compile && npm run oracle && node diff.cjs
